analyseSpatiale.title: Multi-Criteria Spatial Analysis — Saint-Étienne
analyseSpatiale.description: Identifying optimal zones for real estate investment and student housing in Saint-Étienne. AHP weighting + WLC aggregation on 5 criteria (land value, flood risk, proximity to universities/stations/bars) using ArcGIS Pro and IDRISI. M1 Geomatics project, Université Paris 8.
